Test Description: Verify basic GPIO register write and read operations.
Test Steps / Procedure: 1) Initialize or reset the GPIO module. 2) Write known test pattern(s) to GPIO registers. 3) Read back the written registers. 4) Compare read values with expected patterns. 5) Report pass/fail.

Feature: Negative edge detect on alternate pads enable
Test Description: Configure alternate GPIO pads and enable negative-edge detection.
Test Steps / Procedure: 1) Initialize GPIO and select alternate pads. 2) Configure pads as inputs. 3) Enable negative-edge detection on selected pads. 4) Generate negative edges on those pads. 5) Check and clear status/flags. 6) Report pass/fail.

Test Description: Enable GPIO interrupts on negative edges and observe interrupt handling.
Test Steps / Procedure: 1) Initialize GPIO and interrupt controller. 2) Configure GPIO pad(s) for negative-edge interrupt. 3) Enable GPIO interrupt and global interrupts. 4) Generate a negative edge on the configured pin(s). 5) Observe ISR execution and clear interrupt flags. 6) Report pass/fail.

Feature: Positive edge detect on all pads enable
Test Description: Enable positive-edge detection across all GPIO pads.
Test Steps / Procedure: 1) Initialize GPIO. 2) Configure all pads as inputs. 3) Enable positive-edge detection for all pads. 4) Generate positive edges on pads. 5) Check and clear status/flags. 6) Report pass/fail.

Feature: Positive edge detect on alternate pads enable
Test Description: Enable positive-edge detection on alternate GPIO pads.
Test Steps / Procedure: 1) Initialize GPIO and select alternate pads. 2) Configure selected pads as inputs. 3) Enable positive-edge detection on those pads. 4) Generate positive edges on the configured pads. 5) Check and clear status/flags. 6) Report pass/fail.
